title: taraxacum quadrans
intro: Taraxacum quadrans, also known as the wild dandelion or dandelion root, is a perennial plant that belongs to the dandelion genus, Taraxacum. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is used to treat a range of health issues, such as digestive problems, skin conditions, and liver and kidney disorders. The health benefits of Taraxacum quadrans include reducing oxidative stress, improving liver function, and supporting the immune system, as well as exhibiting antibacterial and antiviral properties. Taraxacum quadrans can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
